user_query: The wrangler.toml at the repo root is missing the KV namespace binding for our session store. The worker code in apps/worker/src/storage/sessions.ts references env.SESSION_KV but there is no [[kv_namespaces]] entry in wrangler.toml that declares this binding. Add the KV namespace binding with binding name SESSION_KV and id placeholder __SESSION_KV_ID__.
